Metadata.description: Spectr develops sovereign Norwegian autonomous drone software — mission command, AI-assisted decision support, and EW-resilient operations for any airframe.

Footer.tagline: Autonomous drone software for real-world operations.

Home.hero: Autonomous drone software for real-world operations.
Home.missionStatement: Spectr builds autonomous drone software that keeps missions running on comms-denied battlefields — developed and controlled from Norway.

About.title: About Us
About.heroIntro: Spectr is a Norwegian defense technology company developing autonomous drone software and sovereign mission systems for demanding operational environments.

overview.title: Company Overview
paragraphs: spectr as is a Norwegian defense technology company headquartered in Norway (Org.nr 936 961 967). We develop autonomous drone software for mission command, fleet coordination, and AI-assisted decision support in contested environments.
Our work focuses on software that integrates with the drones operators already fly — from mission planning and staging to resilient communications and autonomous execution when links degrade.

mission.title: Mission
paragraphs: Spectr builds autonomous drone software for comms-denied battlefields. We believe allied forces need mission capability they can trust, control, and sustain — without dependence on foreign supply chains for critical software infrastructure.

Our mission is to deliver sovereign Norwegian software that keeps missions running when GPS is denied, communications are jammed, and conventional systems fail. We build for the conditions operators actually face.

whatWeBuild.title: What We Build
paragraphs: CENTURION is our sovereign mission command platform. The operator defines goals and constraints; Centurion plans, coordinates, and reports across mixed drone fleets. Version 0.1 is operational with mission staging, AI-assisted decision support, and multi-asset coordination.

Spectr does not manufacture drones. We build software that works across airframes — helping operators plan missions, coordinate assets, maintain context under pressure, and execute autonomously when the environment demands it.
Everything is developed in Norway with a focus on field readiness, sovereign control, and operational reliability outside the lab.

whyNorway.title: Why Norway
paragraphs: Norway provides a stable, NATO-aligned foundation for developing critical defense technology under national control. Spectr develops in Norway to maintain sovereignty over software, data, and deployment — reducing supply-chain risk and ensuring allied compatibility.
This model keeps critical mission software local and NDAA Section 889 compatible by design, while integrating with the platforms and sensors operators already field.
National control over code and infrastructure is not optional for the missions our customers run.

technology.title: Technology & Innovation
paragraphs: Spectr software is designed for resilient operation in denied environments — resilient datalinks, autonomous mission execution, and operator workflows that continue when conventional systems fail.
CENTURION brings AI-assisted decision support and natural language interfaces to mission command — helping operators maintain context and coordinate multiple assets under pressure.
We integrate with diverse drone platforms rather than prescribing a single airframe, so customers can adopt capability without replacing existing fleets.

security.title: Security & Compliance
paragraphs: Spectr operates in a sensitive sector. Our products, software, and technical information may be subject to Norwegian export controls, EU export control regulations, and international sanctions laws. We conduct qualification review before engaging with customers and may decline transactions where legal or national-security concerns arise.

We maintain Norwegian ownership and controlled infrastructure. Customer data, mission information, and proprietary technology are handled under strict confidentiality. Defense-related inquiries should not include classified material through public channels.
For more detail on our security commitments, see our

leadership.title: Leadership
paragraphs: Spectr is led by Makwan Soran, Chief Executive Officer. The company is built by engineers working across autonomous systems, secure software, and operator workflow — with a shared focus on technology that performs in real-world conditions.
We are a small, execution-focused team. We hire for practical engineering ability, disciplined delivery, and the judgment required to build technology for demanding operational environments.

Careers.intro: Spectr is building autonomous drone software and operational mission systems from Norway.
Careers.paragraph1: We are looking for people who care about practical engineering, disciplined execution, and technology that can hold up outside the lab.
Careers.paragraph2: If you want to work across autonomous systems, operator workflow, and secure software, we want to hear from you.

Security.title: Security
Security.description: Spectr security, confidentiality, Norwegian ownership, and controlled infrastructure commitments.
Security.principlesHeadline: Verify sovereignty, from ownership to legal compliance.
Security.legalText1: Our operations are structured in accordance with the Norwegian Security Act (sikkerhetsloven) and the Business Security Regulation (virksomhetsikkerhetsforskriften § 83). We maintain organisational and technical safeguards for classified information and critical infrastructure under Norwegian law.
Security.legalText2: We believe critical technology should be developed, owned, and controlled locally — to safeguard Norwegian interests for the long term.
Security.nationalControl: We believe critical technology should be developed under full national control.

Investor.headline: Sovereign autonomous drone software from Norway.
Investor.paragraph1: Spectr is developing Centurion — a sovereign mission command platform for multi-asset coordination, AI-assisted decision support, and autonomous operations across diverse drone fleets.
Investor.paragraph2: Investor relations inquiries are handled directly by the Spectr team. We share company materials, milestone updates, and strategic context with qualified stakeholders.
Investor.quote: Operators need mission software that keeps working when everything else fails.
